slice: Packet #7c — gateway-path external-arrival corroboration (fold #7b into gateway-path)
lane: operator-directed (chatty-scoped; cash the #7b witness position before #8)
doctrine: Position diversity can corroborate or create divergence. It cannot launder absence into cause.
design: ADDITIVE. Existing LAN-side GatewayPathVerdict + evaluate_gateway_path UNCHANGED. New combiner reads the verdict + an optional ExternalArrivalBasis (parsed from nq.beacon_status.v0) -> nq.probe.gateway_path_combined.v1.
cause_semantics: cause_not_inferred=true always; non_claims explicitly refuse: absence is position not cause (not WAN-down/ISP/hop); divergence is ambiguity to investigate; external does not outrank LAN; corroboration (incl. trouble-concordant) = agreement of two positions, not a verified WAN state.
wiring: nq-monitor probe gateway-path --external-beacon-status <path> reads the beacon status, parses to ExternalArrivalBasis (None if unparseable/unknown -> honest absence -> cannot_classify), emits the combined report alongside the LAN-side receipt. No DB write (active-witness lane).

verify.combiner_unit_tests: 7 new tests in gateway_path_probe.rs (full matrix incl. external-never-overrides-LAN-unknown across all 5 unknown verdicts, no-external/no-basis, beacon-status parser 3 verdicts + unparseable->None) -> 22 lib tests pass
verify.build: cargo build -p nq-monitor: 0 warnings (combiner used by CLI, no dead_code)
verify.full_suite: cargo test --all --locked (background) — see loop-receipt update / CI test job

scope_guard: Did NOT enable perpetual beacon cadence; did NOT make absence mean WAN-down; did NOT privilege external over LAN; did NOT start pfSense PHP comparator / Kea / TLS. Additive only.
deferred_named: Automated piping of a live beacon-status into the probe on a cadence (still manual/operator-fed); supervised beacon timer still not enabled.
acceptance: External-arrival witness folded into gateway-path as corroborating/refusing position; cause never inferred; divergence fixtures added; existing verdicts preserved; docs+receipt updated. Packet #7c DONE. Loop returns to AUDIT/idle. Reassess before #8 (pfSense PHP comparator = appliance self-description, clearly lower-rank now).
